metadata.description: Scribe Skills — spec-driven development skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: wiki-page-author
plugins.description: Write, update, and organise project wiki pages as a living spec. Handles ODD callouts, page-level caution blocks, and includes a wiki-page-reviewer subagent.

plugins.name: ticket-author
plugins.description: Author tickets from wiki pages (or wiki diffs) that drive Claude Code implementation, and review the tickets in a pull request. Includes a ticket-reviewer subagent.
